title: Blackspur 1x 16oz Rubber Mallet with Wooden Handle - Home Nail Framing Roofing Straight Handle DIY Hand Tool
features: This mallet is manufactured with a solid rubber head & wooden shaft.
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
description: Product Description 16oz Rubber Mallet This rubber mallet is constructed with a single-piece, solid rubber head. That is securely fitted to the shaft. The rubber is black in colour but non marking at the same time! It a great size, weight and strength, the 16oz head head delivers a gentle but firm blow. However, it is still lightweight for ease of use, storage and carrying. Rubber mallets are a great options over steel hammers. It is safer with a large surface area for less miss stokes and the rubber material gives it bounce resistance! The mallet is suitable for many industrial, trade or DIY tasks, where the steel head is considered unsuitable. The mallet has a hard wooden handle that is strong and ergonomic! It is easy to use, non-slip and comfortable, reducing hand fatigue. This is a Blackspur branded, quality, heavy duty mallet, it has been manufactured to be durable and long lasting. It is made from premium materials and is designed to be strong and hard-wearing. This is a item you will have in your tool kit for years and years! It has a wide range of uses, a very handy tool to have at hand. It is convenient for many diy uses around the home, with flat pack furniture or posts at the beach etc. Also suitable for trade use. Box Contains 1x Rubber Mallet
